briefing: Markets were flat today (NASDAQ -0.1%, S&P 500 +0.2%) with no clear risk-on or risk-off signal. Added two medium-conviction, multi-signal-confirmed positions to use some of the 4 open slots while keeping the rest of the cash in reserve since there wasn't a strong broad-market catalyst to justify full deployment.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum confirmation means checking several technical signals together — like a MACD crossover, RSI in the bullish 55-70 range, and price above its 20-day average — before buying, instead of relying on just one indicator. This helps filter out random price noise and increases confidence that a real uptrend is forming.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能確認是指在買入前同時檢查多項技術指標，例如MACD黃金交叉、RSI處於55-70的多頭區間，以及股價站上20日均線，而不是只依賴單一指標。這樣可以過濾隨機的價格雜訊，提高判斷真實上升趨勢的信心。

market_education.summary_en: Major indices were essentially flat today, with the NASDAQ dipping slightly and the S&P 500 edging up, suggesting investors were in a wait-and-see mode rather than reacting to a major catalyst. Several individual stocks still showed strong technical momentum even though the broad market was directionless. No major market-moving headlines were available in today's feed to cite.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大盤走勢平淡，納指微跌、標普小漲，顯示投資人普遍處於觀望狀態，未見明顯的市場催化劑。儘管大盤方向不明，部分個股仍展現強勁的技術動能。今日資訊中並未提供可引用的重大新聞標題。

trades.reasoning: Score 95 with full signal confirmation (RSI 61.9 bullish zone, MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, price above SMA-20) and diversifies away from tech-heavy holdings into financial exchanges.
Score 95 with confirmed uptrend (RSI 59.7, MACD crossover, rising histogram, price above SMA-20) adds defense/IT services exposure uncorrelated with current portfolio.
